channel.title: Download URLs on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Download URLs on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Copilot usage metrics reports now use GitHub-owned download URLs
item.description:
Copilot usage metrics report downloads now use a GitHub-owned custom domain instead of Azure Front Door URLs. GitHub says this improves URL stability.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Upcoming change to Copilot usage metrics report download URLs
item.description:
GitHub is changing Copilot usage metrics report download links from Azure Front Door domains to a stable GitHub-owned custom domain. The update is intended to improve URL stability.

  • Source: GitHub
